ns0:entry.ns0:title: FalkorDB/FalkorDB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FalkorDB/FalkorDB
Language: c
A super fast Graph Database uses GraphBLAS under the hood for its sparse adjacency matrix graph representation. Our goal is to provide the best Knowledge Graph for LLM (GraphRAG).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenMathLib/OpenBLAS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenMathLib/OpenBLAS
Language: c
OpenBLAS is an optimized BLAS library based on GotoBLAS2 1.13 BSD version.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SoftEtherVPN/SoftEtherVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SoftEtherVPN/SoftEtherVPN
Language: c
Cross-platform multi-protocol VPN software. Pull requests are welcome. The stable version is available at https://github.com/SoftEtherVPN/SoftEtherVPN_Stable.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cesanta/mongoose
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cesanta/mongoose
Language: c
Embedded web server, with TCP/IP network stack, MQTT and Websocket

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTMP, RTMPS, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dorianborian/sesame-robot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dorianborian/sesame-robot
Language: c
An open and affordable mini quadruped robot based on ESP32.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: espressif/esp-idf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/espressif/esp-idf
Language: c
Espressif IoT Development Framework. Official development framework for Espressif SoCs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firedancer-io/firedancer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firedancer-io/firedancer
Language: c
Firedancer is Jump Crypto's Solana validator software.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git/git
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git/git
Language: c
Git Source Code Mirror - This is a publish-only repository but pull requests can be turned into patches to the mailing list via GitGitGadget (https://gitgitgadget.github.io/). Please follow Documentation/SubmittingPatches procedure for any of your improvements.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hathach/tinyusb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hathach/tinyusb
Language: c
An open source cross-platform USB stack for embedded system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: m5stack/StackChan
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/m5stack/StackChan
Language: c
StackChan open source!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: madler/zlib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/madler/zlib
Language: c
A massively spiffy yet delicately unobtrusive compression library.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ntop/nDPI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ntop/nDPI
Language: c
Open Source Deep Packet Inspection Software Toolkit

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openssh/openssh-portable
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openssh/openssh-portable
Language: c
Portable OpenSSH

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openssl/openssl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openssl/openssl
Language: c
General purpose TLS and crypto library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openwall/john
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openwall/john
Language: c
John the Ripper jumbo - advanced offline password cracker, which supports hundreds of hash and cipher types, and runs on many operating systems, CPUs, GPUs, and even some FPGAs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: raspberrypi/linux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/raspberrypi/linux
Language: c
Kernel source tree for Raspberry Pi-provided kernel builds. Issues unrelated to the linux kernel should be posted on the community forum at https://forums.raspberrypi.com/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: raysan5/raylib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/raysan5/raylib
Language: c
A simple and easy-to-use library to enjoy videogames programming

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ventoy/Ventoy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ventoy/Ventoy
Language: c
A new bootable USB solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: winsiderss/systeminformer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/winsiderss/systeminformer
Language: c
A free, powerful, multi-purpose tool that helps you monitor system resources, debug software and detect malware. Brought to you by Winsider Seminars & Solutions, Inc. @ http://www.windows-internals.com
